domains.lastSummary: Confirmed and fixed 2 cmd-domain runtime bugs: gogent-scout now honors stdin-scoped file lists, and gogent-archive now removes hashed permission-cache files.
notes: Wrote cmd-scope artifacts to .bug-hunter/domains/cmd-findings.json, cmd-skeptic.json, cmd-referee.json, and cmd-fix-report.json.
Updated .bug-hunter/sdk-loop-state-runner3.json to mark the cmd domain completed while leaving other domains pending.
A full ./cmd/gogent-permission-gate test run was not used because sandboxed UDS listener tests fail with Unix-socket permission errors; the cache-focused verification passed.

domains.lastSummary: Confirmed and fixed 2 internal-domain runtime bugs in the TUI streaming/spawn path: the CLI driver now tolerates >1 MB NDJSON events, and spawn_agent now preserves final result metadata after stdout truncation.
notes: Wrote domain-scoped artifacts to .bug-hunter/domains/internal-findings.json, internal-skeptic.json, internal-referee.json, and internal-fix-report.json.
Updated .bug-hunter/sdk-loop-state-runner3.json with the internal-domain summary, test commands, bug count, and verification notes.

The broad ./internal/... test run still hits sandbox-only Unix-socket listener failures in internal/tui/bridge and internal/tui/mcp; those were treated as environment limitations, not regressions from these fixes.
The internal domain remains marked in_progress in the loop state because this iteration recorded and fixed confirmed bugs but did not claim full file-by-file coverage of every queued internal file.

domains.lastSummary: Confirmed and fixed 2 pkg-domain temp-directory bugs: cache/data fallbacks no longer spill shared state into world-readable /tmp paths when XDG/HOME directories are unwritable.
notes: Wrote pkg-scope artifacts to .bug-hunter/domains/pkg-findings.json, pkg-skeptic.json, pkg-referee.json, and pkg-fix-report.json.
Updated .bug-hunter/sdk-loop-state-runner3.json to mark the pkg domain completed without touching prior-domain findings.
Pinned pkg/telemetry/routing_decision_test.go to a writable HOME so the XDG fallback assertion verifies the intended ~/.local/share path instead of the sandbox-only /tmp fallback.

history.summary: Confirmed and fixed 2 cmd-domain runtime bugs: gogent-scout now honors stdin-scoped file lists, and gogent-archive now removes hashed permission-cache files.

Confirmed and fixed 2 internal-domain runtime bugs in the TUI streaming/spawn path: the CLI driver now tolerates >1 MB NDJSON events, and spawn_agent now preserves final result metadata after stdout truncation.
Confirmed and fixed 2 pkg-domain temp-directory bugs: cache/data fallbacks no longer spill shared state into world-readable /tmp paths when XDG/HOME directories are unwritable.
